purpose: Self-contained sales and implementation narrative package for LocalWeb Studio pharmacy franchise vertical (RxReady). Ready to share with pharmacy network decision-makers.

documents.title: Entry point — what is this package and how to use it
1-page overview for decision makers
documents.audience: franchise owner, regional director, VP Operations

documents.title: How LocalWeb operates — non-technical operations overview
RxReady system deep dive — features, data architecture, proof point
documents.audience: operations manager, compliance officer, franchise owner

documents.title: 4-week implementation timeline with split responsibilities
documents.audience: project manager, IT director, compliance officer

documents.title: Pricing tiers, ROI model, contract terms, negotiation notes
HIPAA compliance story — what LocalWeb handles vs pharmacy handles
documents.audience: compliance officer, pharmacy director, legal reviewer

documents.title: 15-minute structured sales script with full objection handling
How to build and run the RxReady demo site for a prospect
Structured intake form to collect everything needed from a new client

documents.note: Template only — have attorney review before use as binding contract

documents.title: Full 4-week implementation checklist with owner per task
What is and is not included in the monthly retainer — no ambiguity

highlights: 03-RXREADY-DEEP-DIVE.md: compliance boundaries are architectural (Worker is stateless, no PHI ever stored) — not just policy assertions. Strongest compliance argument in the package.

06-COMPLIANCE-BOUNDARIES.md: full FAQ for compliance officers including BAA non-requirement rationale, Rx lookup privacy analysis, and incident response split. Ready to share with pharmacy legal teams.
07-SALES-PITCH-SCRIPT.md: complete 15-minute script with word-for-word objection handling for HIPAA, downtime, setup timeline, and existing website concerns. Includes close language.
08-DEMO-SITE-CHECKLIST.md: step-by-step demo setup with hardcoded test Rx numbers, demo queue data, Formspree live submission walkthrough, and fallback scripts for when the demo breaks.
templates/SERVICE-AGREEMENT-TEMPLATE.md: full contract template covering scope, IP ownership, data privacy representations, BAA non-requirement, limitation of liability, and handoff terms.
